subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of the All-Merciful! Keen indeed is thy vision, and a new creation hath been brought forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت رحمانیت بصرت حدید است و خلقت خلق جدید
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
